title: RBAC middleware configuration
description: Path-based access-control rules consumed by middleware.RBAC. Authoritative validation lives in rbac.NewRBACMatcher; this schema covers structural validation for editors.

defaultPolicy.description: Action applied when no rule matches the request path.

rules.description: Path-keyed allow/deny rules. Path matching prefers exact paths, then the longest matching prefix.

path.description: Exact request path (e.g. "/api/foo/GetBar") or a prefix ending in '*' (e.g. "/api/foo/*"). The '*' suffix matches the empty string and any suffix.

allowRoles.description: Roles granted access. Empty or omitted means "no positive constraint" — useful for deny-only rules.

denyRoles.description: Roles denied access. Evaluated before allowRoles; a match here rejects regardless of allowRoles.
